role: Embedding engine — keeps MEGABrain vector store fed with new knowledge
data_sources: training.jsonl (primary — watch for new lines via file seek watermark)
memory.db conversations (embed all exchanges not yet in MEGABrain)
Weaviate LegacyKnowledge (pull 10 random objects per tick if training.jsonl has <50 lines)
rules: Embed every new training.jsonl entry into MEGABrain (category=training)
Embed new memory.db conversations not yet embedded (category=conversation)
When training.jsonl is sparse (<50 lines), pull LegacyKnowledge objects and embed them as seed data (category=seed)
Track embedded UUIDs in neon_seen.json to avoid duplicates
